Preliminary Estimated Flu Disease Burden 2024-2025 Flu Season 
May 9, 2025 
2024-2025 Flu Season 
The estimates provided below are the last update of the preliminary in-season disease burden estimates for the 2024-2025 season unless there is a shift in activity during the summer time. Reporting of preliminary in-season burden estimates for the 2025-2026 season will begin again in fall 2025 and preliminary end of season estimates for the 2024-2025 season will be available in November 2025. 
At a glance 
Each year, from late fall months through early spring months, CDC provides weekly estimates of the burden of influenza in the United States. 
CDC uses models to estimate the range of flu illnesses, medical visits, hospitalizations, and deaths related to flu that have occurred during the season to date. 
CDC uses the estimates of the burden of flu in the population and the impact of flu vaccination to inform policy and communications related to flu. 
Background and Preliminary Estimates 
This web page provides weekly, preliminary estimates of the cumulative in-season numbers of flu illnesses, medical visits, hospitalizations, and deaths in the United States. It is not possible to know the exact number of people who have experienced flu il
